Package dk.mada.jaxrs.openapi

package dk.mada.jaxrs.openapi
Transforms OpenApi schema-based model to the internal model. This is the only package that should work with OpenApi types. Steps in converting the OpenApi document into the internal model: - Use OpenAPIParser to parse the document - Convert the OpenApi data to model types. All type references are made with ParserTypeRef since there may be references to types not yet encountered. - Find and resolve name conflicts. This causes all affected TypeName references to be updated. - Finally replace all ParserTypeRefs with model's TypeRefs and parser DTO instances with (possibly renamed) model DTO instances. The model is now self-contained and immutable, ready to be used by the generators.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.mada.jaxrs
    OpenApi JAX-RS client code generator.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.generator
    Generator takes care of generating the classes.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.gradle
    Declaration of simple API between the Gradle plugin and the generator.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.model
    A simplified local model that is decoupled from the model provided by the OpenApi library.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.naming
    Takes care of model and source naming rules.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.utils
    Simple utilities used by the generator.
  • Class
    Description
    ApiTransformer
    Transforms OpenApi operations to local model objects.
    ConflictRenamer
    Renames types to avoid on-disk conflicts.
    DtoTransformer
    Transforms OpenApi dtos (models) to local model objects.
    InfoTransformer
    Transforms OpenApi info to local model objects.
    OpenapiGeneratorUtils
    Methods lifted directly from OpenApi-generator.
    Parser
    Parses OpenAPI specification and transforms to local model classes.
    ParserOpts
    parser-* configuration options.
    ParserTypeCombined
    Type representing a synthetic combined class during parsing.
    ParserTypeComposite
    Type representing a composite class (schema with allOf) during parsing.
    ParserTypeRef
    A reference to types used during parsing.
    ParserTypeRefs
    Constructs and keeps track of parser references.
    ParserTypes
    Types found while parsing.
    Resolver
    Works through a parsed model that contains parser type references and resolves them to pure model types.
    SecurityTransformer
    Transforms OpenApi security to local model objects.
    TypeConverter
    Converts a specification schema to an internal model type.
    TypeUnknownAtParseTime
    Special type for marking types unknown at parse time.
